reason: Stand by Me captures teen friendship and high-stakes adventure with earnest heart
Better Off Dead delivers adolescent angst and comic hope in a classic ’80s teen romp
Back to the Future zips ’80s teen energy into a heartfelt, high-stakes time-travel journey
Dirty Dancing spins youthful yearning and triumphant dance in indelible ’80s style
My Own Private Idaho blends teen longing with heartfelt drama and a touch of ’80s grit
Kids seethes with raw adolescent angst and the world-ending stakes of teenage survival
Heathers thrusts teen hierarchy into dark satire with edgy wit and high-school stakes
Dead Poets Society inspires teen soul searching and triumphant solidarity at prep school
Rudy channels ’80s teen dreams and underdog triumph in a small-town sports drama
Heat may not be teen-centric but its brotherly bond and high-stakes tension echo youthful intensity
